headline: Where Analysts Pushed Back On PEP Stock's Latest Earnings Call
summary: PepsiCo management spent its latest earnings call defending its big bet on North American growth, and the answers revealed exactly where the strategy is under pressure.

headline: PepsiCo improves sustainable sourcing, delays emissions reporting
summary: The company reported a four percentage point increase in sustainably sourced ingredients in 2025 but has yet to document Scope 3 emissions metrics.

headline: The Market Hates Uncertainty And PepsiCo Is Giving Us A Lot To Think About
summary: PepsiCo has experienced notable volatility after strong early-year momentum, reflecting shifting consumer spending. Read why PEP stock is a hold.

headline: Conagra and 6 More Food Stock Dividends That Are at Risk
summary: Conagra Brands’  dividend might face a cut this week.  A terrible environment for consumer staples is putting pressure on plenty of other food stocks’ payouts too, especially candy and meat companies.  Conagra Brands has seen its shares tumble 17% this year, pushing its dividend yield north of 10%.

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - July 2026
